name: TestWaitForMostNodeAdr
title: TestWaitForMostNodeAdr
syntax: long TestWaitForMostNodeAdr(long aValue, unsigned long aTimeout);
description: The function waits for the expiration of the time aTimeout for the occurrence of the MOST event of a change of its own node address.
Consider to set always the appropriate bus context in a multibus environment before the function is called.
Further information on site MultiBus Environment.

parameters.name: aValue
parameters.description: Expected value of the node address that should be in the MOST event. The specification -1 (wildcard) stands for any values.
